markdown:
#  Claim your Business on the Procore Construction Network 
##  Things to Consider 
  * Only unclaimed businesses can be claimed.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Procore Construction Network: <https://www.procore.com/network>
  2. Search for your business.
  3. Click on your business.
  4. Click **Claim this Free Business Page**.
  5. Click **Get Started**.
  6. Enter your name and email address, then click **Next**.
  7. If you already have a Procore login, you will be directed to the Procore login screen. Enter your email address and password, then click **Log In**.  
OR  
If you do NOT already have a Procore login, navigate to your email client and open the Procore email to verify your email address. Click **Verify Email Address**.
    1. Enter a password and mark the required boxes, then click **Next**.
  8. Click **Finish**.


#####  Note
After you claim, you can log in to Procore immediately. However, you need to wait 24-48 hours before you can update any information about your business while Procore verifies your claim. See [How are businesses approved to be listed on the Procore Construction Network?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-are-businesses-approved-to-be-listed-on-the-procore-construction-network)
## See Also
  * [What should I know about claiming a business on the Procore Construction Network?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-should-I-know-about-claiming-a-business-on-the-procore-construction-network)
  * [What is the difference between a claimed and unclaimed business on the Procore Construction Network?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-a-claimed-and-unclaimed-business-on-the-procore-construction-network)
  * [Create a Free Procore Company Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account)
